summary: Integrated ADR 0251 exact-main durable verification on top of the already-landed 0.177.86 mainline by confirming the live worker checkout still retains the stage-smoke helper and dependent runtime paths, the worker-local gate-status replay remains healthy, the authenticated runtime-assurance API and guest-local ops-portal partials stay aligned, and the governed promotion gate continues to reject the stale staged Grafana receipt on the current verified 0.130.59 production baseline.

verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` advanced `origin/main` to `dfabe86676e6940382c18dfbc836ac3f3ea7206c`, which still carries ADR 0251 on repository version `0.177.86` while the verified platform baseline now reads `0.130.59`; this follow-up records the exact-main durable verification on top of that latest realistic baseline.
SSH verification on 2026-03-29 returned hostname `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base`, `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a`, and kernel `6.17.13-2-pve`.

Using the repo-local platform-context token, `https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/runtime-assurance` returned `status 200` with `generated_at: 2026-03-29T20:35:32Z`, `total: 47`, `pass: 28`, `degraded: 19`, `failed: 0`, and `unknown: 0`.

verification.check: Live worker checkout keeps the stage-smoke helper durable
verification.observed: Guest-local verification on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/scripts/stage_smoke.py` exists, `scripts/promotion_pipeline.py` imports `stage_smoke`, and `scripts/ops_portal/runtime_assurance.py` imports the same helper.

`python3 /srv/proxmox_florin_server/config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py --repo-path /srv/proxmox_florin_server` returned `status: "ok"`, and the embedded `post_merge_run` stayed `passed` with `executed_at: "2026-03-29T19:37:24.365664+00:00"`.

`http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/overview` and `http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/runtime-assurance` both returned `status 200` on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and neither rendered the degraded runtime-assurance banner.

verification.check: Governed promotion gate still rejects the stale staged Grafana receipt
verification.observed: Running `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/scripts/run_python_with_packages.sh pyyaml -- /srv/proxmox_florin_server/scripts/promotion_pipeline.py --check-gate --service grafana --staging-receipt /srv/proxmox_florin_server/receipts/live-applies/staging/2026-03-27-adr-0183-staging-live-apply.json` on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned exit code `1`; the current reasons were Prometheus SLO query timeouts, projected vCPU commitment `36.0` exceeding target `22.5`, and the stale receipt age, while the returned `stage_smoke_gate` payload stayed `enforced=false` with `required_suite_ids=[]` and `observed_suites=[]`.

notes: This canonical receipt supersedes the branch-local exact-main text transcript in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0251-exact-main-durable-verification.txt` and records the latest realistic mainline verification in structured form.

Release `0.177.86` already carried ADR 0251 implementation onto `main`; release `0.177.87` is the follow-up that records the exact-main durable verification and updates the canonical truth surfaces to `live_applied`.
Platform version `0.130.59` is already the current verified mainline baseline; this follow-up records ADR 0251 as fully live without advancing beyond that already-verified platform state.
ADR metadata keeps `Implemented In Platform Version: 0.130.58` as the first platform version where ADR 0251 was verified live, while this receipt records the newer exact-main baseline.
